purpose: Vertical column of light descending onto product. Sharp atmospheric beam.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Monumental product photography of {product_descriptor} at base of vertical column of light descending from upper frame at slight angle, sharp atmospheric beam with visible dust particles and god rays, complete darkness surrounding, ceremonial monolithic composition, shot on 85mm at f/8, no text, no watermark, no human figure {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: T10. Saudi adaptation guidance: Ceremonial register for luxury Saudi launches. Carefully avoids religious symbolism — negative explicitly excludes. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per quarter.
